{{Quote|Follow the Triellus Trade Route until you reach the 5709-DC Shipping Lane, then bear 47° to starboard, set your beacon finder on frequency TG69-75, and ride our beam all the way here!|[[Tatooine Visitors Bureau]] brochure|<ref name="SWTJ">''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]''</ref>}}
The '''5709-DC Shipping Lane''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]]. The route was a spur of the larger [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]] that connected the route with the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. In [[137 ABY]], the 5709-DC Shipping Lane was the location of an act of piracy committed by members of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate, led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dovrin]], against an Imperial shipping vessel of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]].<ref name="swl37" />

{{Route-stub}}
